name: /pr-corpus-learn dry-run prints the patterns that would be promoted without actually persisting them
command: mkdir -p pr-corpus active-rules && printf '[{"id":"p-test","verbatim_quote":"x","usefulness_estimate":4,"supporting_prs":[{"number":1,"org":"a","tier":1},{"number":2,"org":"b","tier":1},{"number":3,"org":"c","tier":1}]}]\n' > pr-corpus/patterns.json && printf '{"gate":"pass"}\n' > pr-corpus/quality-eval.json && bash "$CLAUDE_PLUGIN_ROOT/commands/pr-corpus-learn.sh" --patterns pr-corpus/patterns.json --gate-result pr-corpus/quality-eval.json --rules-out active-rules --dry-run 2>out.txt && grep -q 'would_promote=p-test' out.txt && [ ! -f active-rules/p-test.yaml ] && echo ok 1>&2
